name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley
description:
Description

"He supposed it was a good thing, being disturbed by what he saw. Showed he still has some bit of humanity left in him despite it all.."

Nightmares were always a constant, haunting him with regrets of all sorts and events he rather were left behind where he had left them as if the scars on his body weren't enough.

He was used to dealing with them alone, forcing his body to move and redirect his focus. Though, this time, he wasn't alone.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
